proposal_summary: This proposal aims to onboard wstETH (wrapped staked ETH) from Lido to the Aave V3 Base Network, enriching the liquid staking assets options and configuring specific risk parameters.

disclosed_entities.name: Lido
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: onboarding of wstETH (wrapped staked ETH) from Lido

claimed_actions.raw_action: Onboard wstETH to Aave V3 Base Network by configuring risk parameters
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Will provide Aave users with more options for earning staking rewards on their collateral by allowing wstETH to be supplied and borrowed.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The table below illustrates the configured risk parameters for wstETH

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal is a standard asset onboarding procedure with a clearly defined set of risk parameters and no complex contract modifications.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence:
Simple Summary

This AIP proposes the onboarding of wstETH

limitations: No precise implementation contract address is provided, only a GitHub link to the source code.
